toolbar-buttons.title: Toolbar buttons
toolbar-buttons.desc: Show / hide few actions from the toolbar

api-key.title: Google Gemini API Key
api-key.desc: The key that makes Google Gemini work

api-key.title: Libre Translate optional API Key
api-key.desc: The key that makes Libre Translate work

endpoint.title: Llama AI endpoint
endpoint.desc: The AI endpoint to make it work

sidebar.title: Show sidebar by default
sidebar.desc: Show the glossary sidebar everytime you enter the app

theme.title: Theme
theme.desc: Theme and color of the app

brightness.title: Brightness
brightness.desc: Adjust the app's brightness from 0 to 100

compact-toolbar.title: Compact Toolbar
compact-toolbar.desc: Show smaller buttons instead in the toolbar

translatable-state.title: Default Translatable State
translatable-state.desc: Initial value of the Android translatable state

show-translatable.title: Show Translatable column
show-translatable.desc: Show translatable table column every time you enter the app

auto-detect.title: Auto-detect language
auto-detect.desc: Auto-detect language everytime the XLIFF file is opened

preserve-meta.title: Preserve Metadata
preserve-meta.desc: Keep existing translation metadata when opening or saving XLIFF files

curr-namespace-only.title: Show current namespace only
curr-namespace-only.desc: Toggle between current namespace or entire translation

line-numbers.title: Show line numbers
line-numbers.desc: Show translation line numbers inside the table

sidebar.title: Show sidebar by default
sidebar.desc: Show the tree sidebar everytime you enter the app

auto-save.title: Auto-save Translations
auto-save.desc: Automatically save translations every time you save a string

preserve-empty.title: Preserve Empty Translations
preserve-empty.desc: Keep or maintain empty translations intact

auto-detect-base.title: Auto-detect base language
auto-detect-base.desc: Automatically detect the base language from the selected file path when possible

danger-zone.title: Danger Zone
danger-zone.desc: Be careful before deleting settings related to I18N Translator

clear-recent.title: Clear Recent Translations
clear-recent.desc: This will clear recent translation data
clear-recent.confirmation: Are you sure you want to clear recent translations?

clear-settings.title: Clear Settings (Permanent)
clear-settings.desc: This will clear all settings data
clear-settings.confirmation: Are you sure you want to clear all settings?

restore-settings.title: Restore Defaults
restore-settings.desc: This will reset all settings into default values
restore-settings.confirmation: Are you sure you want to restore settings to defaults?

errors.reset-settings: Failed to reset some settings to defaults
